subject: Houndstone, a spectral ghost-dog Pokemon depicted as a pale, ethereal canine seated near a dark tombstone-like form on misty ground
description: A pale, ghostly dog-like creature sits on misty purple-grey ground beside a dark rounded tombstone shape. The creature has large dark eyes, a soft rounded body, and ethereal wisp-like tendrils trailing from it. The atmosphere is foggy and dim, with muted purples and greys dominating the scene. The overall mood is eerie and melancholic, evoking a graveyard or haunted setting. Soft ambient lighting with no harsh shadows gives the image a dreamlike, spectral quality.
foreground: spectral ghost-dog creature seated on misty ground
background: misty foggy void with dark tombstone form and ethereal wisps
